socrates.text:
the program with fixes.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "awk 'NR>3{y=int((NR-4)/2400); x=(NR-4)%2400; if(y>=810 && y<=1177 && x>=1077 && x<=1322){r=$1;g=$2;b=$3; if(g<60 && r>180) printf \"(%d,%d): %d %d %d\\n\",y,x,r,g,b}}' /app/image.ppm | sort -k2 -t' ' -rn | head -20\n
